summary: Stripe Customer Portal Integration Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests PASSED (100%). All 8 frontend UI tests PASSED. Portal session endpoint, cancel/reactivate flows, and billing button visibility gating all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/checkout/create-portal-session returns 401 without auth token
VERIFIED: POST /api/checkout/create-portal-session returns 400 'No billing account found' for users without stripe_customer_id (basic tier users)
VERIFIED: POST /api/checkout/create-portal-session requires return_url parameter (422 if missing)
VERIFIED: POST /api/stripe/cancel returns 400 'already on free plan' for basic tier users
VERIFIED: POST /api/stripe/reactivate returns 400 'No pending cancellation found' when no cancellation scheduled
VERIFIED: GET /api/stripe/billing-history returns correct structure (transactions, subscription, cancel_at_period_end)
VERIFIED: GET /api/subscription returns basic tier for Emma Chen (free user)
VERIFIED: UI - Manage Billing button is NOT in DOM for basic tier (correct gating via tier !== 'basic')
VERIFIED: UI - Cancel Plan button is NOT in DOM for basic tier
VERIFIED: UI - Upgrade button IS visible for basic tier users
VERIFIED: UI - Plan shows 'Starter' label with 'FREE' badge
VERIFIED: UI - Billing History section loads and displays transactions
VERIFIED: UI - Compare Plans button visible for basic tier
VERIFIED: UI - Upgrade highlights section visible for basic tier
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe Customer Portal integration fully tested. Key behaviors verified: (1) create-portal-session requires stripe_customer_id on user doc - returns 400 if missing, (2) Manage Billing button and Cancel Plan button are gated by tier !== 'basic' in SettingsPage.js BillingTab component (lines 329-351), (3) Basic tier users see Upgrade button, Compare Plans button, and Upgrade highlights section instead. Emma Chen is on basic tier without stripe_customer_id, so portal button correctly hidden for her. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_stripe_portal.py covers all portal, cancel, reactivate, and billing-history endpoints.

portal_session_endpoint.stripe_customer_required: WORKING - returns 400 'No billing account found' for users without stripe_customer_id

cancel_endpoint.basic_tier_blocked: WORKING - returns 400 'already on free plan' for basic tier

ui_billing_tab.manage_billing_hidden_for_basic: WORKING - button not in DOM for basic tier
ui_billing_tab.cancel_plan_hidden_for_basic: WORKING - button not in DOM for basic tier
ui_billing_tab.billing_history_loads: WORKING - section visible with transactions table
